scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n "CLIENT,ADMIN,BACKEND" -c "blue,green,magenta" "pnpm --filter ai-platform-ui dev" "pnpm --filter admin-frontend dev" "pnpm dev:backend"
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && (cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt)
